# PolyCraft - International Commercial Partnership
# https://polycraftpartners.github.io
# Last updated: March 2026

## What PolyCraft is

PolyCraft is an international commercial partnership firm founded by Dany Kanzari. We help B2B companies build revenue traction in markets they do not yet own. We are not a sales agency, not a consultant, and not a staffing firm. We are a senior commercial partner that enters the market alongside the client and takes accountability for the revenue trajectory.

## What PolyCraft does

PolyCraft offers three services in a logical progression:

1. Commercial Market Entry (project-based): Map the target market, build the qualified prospect pipeline, open the first relationships. Delivers a Commercial Landscape Report, 150-300 qualified contacts, and initial senior relationships. Fixed project fee, 50% on signing.

2. Fractional Commercial Director (monthly retainer): Embed as the senior commercial voice. Own the pipeline, key relationships, market monitoring, and commercial strategy. Weekly strategy sessions, monthly performance reports. 90-day minimum.

3. Commercial Team Build and Deployment: Recruit, train, and deploy a commercial team. Two models: Build to Transfer (client takes ownership) or Build to Retain (PolyCraft manages permanently). 6-12 month engagement.

## Founder

Dany Kanzari. 20+ years in B2B commercial across the US, UK, Ireland, France, Switzerland, Slovakia, Tunisia, and MENA. Fluent in Arabic (native), French (fluent), and English (fluent). Based in Ariana, Tunisia.

## Markets served

United States (USD, primary market), United Kingdom (GBP), Ireland (EUR), France (EUR, native French), MENA including Gulf States and North Africa (USD, native Arabic), Central and Eastern Europe including Slovakia (EUR).

## Who PolyCraft works with

B2B companies of any size or geography that are entering or expanding in one of the six markets listed above. The client must have a defined product or service, be willing to invest in the commercial process (tools, time, and commitment), and engage for a minimum of 90 days.

## Free resource

The Market Entry Readiness Scorecard is a free 12-question assessment that tells a B2B founder or commercial director whether their business is ready to enter a new market. Result maps to the right PolyCraft service. Available at /scorecard.html.
